subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Us unto him who hath quaffed the choice wine of divine knowledge, when the fragrance of the garment of the All-Merciful was diffused throughout all creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن شرب رحیق العرفان اذ تضوع عرف قمیص الرحمن فی الامکان
